name: rpg-loremaster
description: A game master's toolkit for building dark-leaning Pathfinder 2e campaigns end to end — the campaign spine, regions and nations, cities, factions, locations, NPCs, artifacts and relics, image-generation prompts with a campaign visual style bible, music-generation prompts with a campaign audio style bible, and a Three-Clue-Rule clue map, plus an interactive conductor that ties them into one consistent campaign via a running campaign bible.
